name: PlanRadar
description: Manage construction and real estate projects with PlanRadar. Access projects, tickets (defects/tasks), users, documents, and schedules via REST API. Ideal for quality management, defect tracking, inspections, and field reporting in the Bau sector.
instructions:
This connector uses the PlanRadar REST API v1. Key conventions:

**Authentication**: Uses API Key via the `X-PlanRadar-API-Key` header. Generate a Personal Access Token from PlanRadar Settings > API Access.

**Base URL structure**: All endpoints are scoped to a customer: `/api/v1/{customer_id}/...`. The customer_id is set via the PLANRADAR_CUSTOMER_ID environment variable.

**Response format**: Responses follow the JSON:API specification. Data is wrapped in a `data` object (or array) with `id`, `type`, and `attributes` fields. Example: `{ "data": { "id": "123", "type": "projects", "attributes": { "name": "My Project" } } }`.

**Request format**: The API accepts form-encoded request bodies for POST/PUT operations.

**Rate limiting**: Maximum 30 requests per minute. Exceeding this disables your token for 5 minutes.

**Pagination**: Use `page` and `per_page` query parameters. Default page size varies by endpoint.

**Ticket predefined fields**: Title (mandatory), Assignee, Receiver (CC), Due date, Status, Priority, Progress, Parent Ticket, Layer. Only Title is required for creation.

**Ticket statuses**: Open, In Progress, Resolved, Feedback, Closed, Rejected.

**Custom fields**: Tickets support project-specific custom fields of types: Date, Time, List, Text, Number, Decimal, Checkbox. Custom field values are returned in ticket attributes.

**Layers**: Every ticket must be associated with a layer (floor plan/drawing). When creating tickets, specify the layer_id.

**Project attributes**: id, name, homepage, country, projectnumber, description, city, zipcode, street, author-id.

**API versions**: PlanRadar is migrating to v2. This adapter uses v1 which is stable and fully supported.

**Workflow**: Typical flow is: List projects → Select project → List layers → Create/list tickets (on a layer) → Assign users → Set status/priority/progress → Manage documents → Generate reports.

tools.name: planradar_list_projects
tools.description: List all projects accessible to the authenticated user. Returns project data in JSON:API format with attributes: id, name, homepage, country, projectnumber, description, city, zipcode, street, author-id. Supports pagination.

tools.name: planradar_get_project
tools.description: Get a single project by its ID. Returns full project details including id, name, homepage, country, projectnumber, description, city, zipcode, street, and author-id.

tools.name: planradar_list_tickets
tools.description: List tickets (defects, tasks, issues) within a specific project. Returns ticket data with predefined fields (Title, Assignee, Status, Priority, Progress, Due date, Layer, Parent Ticket) and custom fields. Statuses: Open, In Progress, Resolved, Feedback, Closed, Rejected. Supports pagination.

project_id.description: The project ID to list tickets from

tools.name: planradar_get_ticket
tools.description: Get a single ticket by its ID within a project. Returns full ticket details including all predefined fields (Title, Assignee, Status, Priority, Progress, Due date, Layer, Parent Ticket) and custom fields.

tools.name: planradar_create_ticket
tools.description: Create a new ticket (defect, task, issue) in a project. Title is the only mandatory field. Tickets must be associated with a layer (floor plan). Available statuses: Open, In Progress, Resolved, Feedback, Closed, Rejected.

project_id.description: The project ID to create the ticket in

status.description: Ticket status. Values: Open, In Progress, Resolved, Feedback, Closed, Rejected

assignee_id.description: User ID to assign the ticket to

layer_id.description: Layer ID (floor plan/drawing) to associate the ticket with

tools.name: planradar_update_ticket
tools.description: Update an existing ticket in a project. Only include fields you want to change. Available statuses: Open, In Progress, Resolved, Feedback, Closed, Rejected.

status.description: Updated status. Values: Open, In Progress, Resolved, Feedback, Closed, Rejected

due_date.description: Updated due date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2025-12-31')

tools.name: planradar_list_users
tools.description: List all users in the account. Returns user data including names, email addresses, roles, and permissions. Users can be in-house users or subcontractors.

tools.name: planradar_get_user
tools.description: Get a single user by their ID. Returns full user details including name, email, role, and permissions.

tools.name: planradar_list_documents
tools.description: List documents (plans, photos, attachments) within a specific project. Supports pagination.

project_id.description: The project ID to list documents from

tools.name: planradar_get_document
tools.description: Get a single document by its ID within a project. Returns document metadata and download information.
